The Patriarchal Priesthood is a Priestly lineage in [[Mormonism]]. Its history is subject to criticism for having been a separate priestly lineage which was later incorporated into the [[Melchizedek Priesthood]]

It is considered a predecessor to the [[Alpha Priesthood]]

{{Priestly Lineages}}

[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Patriarchal Priesthood]][[Category:Priesthood offices of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
